provenance.verdict_reason: Arabesque No. 1 in E Major. Slice 2.5 URL verification. License confirmed: CC-BY-SA-3.0. Evidence URL: http://piano-midi.de/debuss.htm. Verdict: internal — verification revealed hard failure (page gone or claim mismatch). Failure reasons: composer page resolved but did not reference song title fragments for "Arabesque No. 1 in E Major"; per-song attribution unsupported: composer page is up with the right creator + license, but its content does not reference this work — the upstream canonically does not carry this MIDI.

annotation_target.structure: Second theme consequent — lyrical arc closes gently
teaching_goals: the close is gentle, not a stop
style_tips: the ending feels like an exhale

teaching_notes.note: The phrase closes gently — let the triplets carry the resolution.
technique: diminuendo into the final note of the phrase

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 21–24 of Arabesque No. 1 in E Major (continuation of mm. 17–20), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 21–24 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 21–24.
Measures 21–24 complete the second theme section — the melody continues with its lyrical arc and the triplets support it underneath. The phrase closes gently. Let me loop mm. 21–24.
Debussy Arabesque No. 1 mm. 21–24: second theme completion, lyrical arc closes. Pairs with mm. 17–20.
